title: Simple FullBright GameRule
description: Adds a gamerule that applies Night Vision (forever) to anyone who joins the world or respawns!
body:
![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9174d4add8da8e466c6d4a89cea1e0c017877d16.png) ![Loading...](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=158000&label=Downloads&prefix=+%20&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/yDGNTtCD&logo=modrinth) # Simple Full Bright Game Rule **Adds a gamerule to the game that applies Night Vision to anyone who joins the world. (or dies and respawns.)**
## Features - GUI to toggle the gamerule. (Requies OP) - Server-side support. - Light-weight and easy to use. # Note - Disabling or enabling the gamerule later doesn't automatically apply or clear the Night Vision effect, you need to respawn/rejoin for the effect to come or clear it yourself. - And if this wasn't like this there would be a huge lag while playing in the mod because it would have checked if you changed the gamerule every tick a command was typed. ## Version Difference | Feature | **Forge Version** | **NeoForge Version** | | ---------------------------- | ---------------- | --------------------------- | | Gamerule location | Player section | Player section | | Settings GUI | ✅ Yes | ❌ No | | Auto Night Vision on join | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | | Auto Night Vision on respawn | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | | Modpack friendly | ❌ No | ✅ Yes | _Only the Forge Version has the GUI feature._
